summary: Remove premature deprecation warnings from validateAgentsMap() and validateKnowledgeMap() — they do distinct work from Assembler.checkCoverage() and should not be deprecated.

decisions.what: Remove warnings rather than replace functions
decisions.why: checkCoverage() checks graph documentation edges, while the core functions check AGENTS.md structural integrity — they are complementary, not replacements

decisions.what: No graph integration in core validators
decisions.why: CLI already handles graph-optional enrichment in docs.ts; lifting into core is YAGNI
